StoryHistory.title: Story History
StoryHistory.description: Stores the generated story sequences for users.

userId.description: The UID of the user who generated the story.

title.description: A short title for the story.

selections.description: The selections used to generate the story.

UserConfig.title: User Config
UserConfig.description: Private user configurations including their browser-based Gemini API key.

geminiApiKey.description: The user's private Gemini API key.

updatedAt.description: When the configuration was last updated.
